title: Stable Release User
objective: A disposable OpenClaw env that has been started on the stable release track before testing beta or local-build upgrade behavior.

setup.title: Write Kova Stable Release-Track Fixture
setup.intent: Persist Kova-owned stable release-track metadata after the env is first started so reports can prove the upgrade source shape.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node -e 'const fs=require("fs"), path=require("path"); const home=process.env.OPENCLAW_HOME; const dir=path.join(home,".kova"); fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(dir,"release-track.json"),JSON.stringify({schemaVersion:"kova.fixture.release-track.v1",releaseTrack:"stable"},null,2));'

cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes Kova release-track fixture files

source.note: The scenario starts the env through the real stable release track before upgrading it.
